markdown.markdown:
- **June 2026** — I launched this website.
- **May 2026** — I gave two talks at PrivCrypt 2026, affiliated with Eurocrypt 2026, on “Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure” and “Multi-Verifier Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials.”
- **April 2026** — I gave a COSIC seminar on “Multi-Verifier Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials.” [Watch the talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0fgxph8I6Aw).

## 2025

- **November 2025** — The ePrint version of “Multi-Verifier Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials” is now available. [Read the paper](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/2156).
- **November 2025** — I gave a talk at NordiCrypt on “Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure.”
- **September 2025** — I visited Professor Anja Lehmann at the Hasso Plattner Institute, University of Potsdam.
- **September 2025** — Our paper “Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure” was accepted to IACR Communications in Cryptology. [Read the paper](https://cic.iacr.org/p/2/3/15).
- **September 2025** — The ePrint version of “SoK: Connecting the Dots in Privacy-Preserving ML — Systematization of MPC Protocols and Conversions Between Secret Sharing Schemes” is now available. [Read the paper](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/1679).
- **August 2025** — I gave a COSIC seminar on “Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure.” [Watch the talk](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MILVlPhOqz0).
- **February 2025** — The ePrint version of “Traceable Verifiable Secret Sharing and Applications” is now available. [Read the paper](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/318).
- **January 2025** — The ePrint version of “Keyed-Verification Anonymous Credentials with Highly Efficient Partial Disclosure” is now available. [Read the paper](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/041).

## 2023

- **October 2023** — Our paper “Security and Privacy Threat Analysis for Solid” was accepted to the IEEE Secure Development Conference (SecDev). [Read the paper](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10305608).

## 2021

- **September 2021** — Our paper “Analysis and Improvement of the SPACF Scheme in Vehicular Ad-hoc Networks” was accepted to the 18th International ISC Conference on Information Security and Cryptology (ISCISC). [Read the paper](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9720470).
